Source.Name: intel-compute-runtime-legacy
Source.Summary: Intel® Graphics Compute Runtime for legacy platforms
Source.Description: The Intel(R) Graphics Compute Runtime for oneAPI Level Zero and OpenCL(TM) Driver is an open source project providing compute API support (Level Zero, OpenCL) for Intel graphics hardware architectures (HD Graphics, Xe). This package supports Broadwell, Skylake, Kaby Lake, Coffee Lake, Apollo Lake, Gemini Lake, Ice Lake and Elkhart Lake.

Package.Name: intel-compute-runtime-legacy
Package.Summary: Intel® Graphics Compute Runtime for legacy platforms
Package.Description: The Intel(R) Graphics Compute Runtime for oneAPI Level Zero and OpenCL(TM) Driver is an open source project providing compute API support (Level Zero, OpenCL) for Intel graphics hardware architectures (HD Graphics, Xe). This package supports Broadwell, Skylake, Kaby Lake, Coffee Lake, Apollo Lake, Gemini Lake, Ice Lake and Elkhart Lake.

Package.Name: intel-compute-runtime-legacy-devel
Package.Description: The Intel(R) Graphics Compute Runtime for oneAPI Level Zero and OpenCL(TM) Driver is an open source project providing compute API support (Level Zero, OpenCL) for Intel graphics hardware architectures (HD Graphics, Xe). This package supports Broadwell, Skylake, Kaby Lake, Coffee Lake, Apollo Lake, Gemini Lake, Ice Lake and Elkhart Lake.
